checks.command: python3 hash check against P2 BUILD_LOCK_INPUT_MATRIX
checks.summary: No P2 locked file hash mismatches
No forbidden runtime reads or imports

validated_rules: natural language primary semantic authority and inventory-as-index role
one adoption decision per explicit inventory row
actual upstream file hashes match declared upstream_hashes
schema record keys reject missing required fields and off-schema fields
canonical source_refs resolve to approved closure units, approved distill authority refs, or blocked gaps
closure-like canonical source_refs resolve to approved closure units or blocked gaps
closure node/message coverage to canonical element or blocked gap
canonical projection excludes clarification, conflict, gap-routed, open-gap, structural-review, blocked, inductive rows, off-schema approved_element_id gap fields, and unknown source authority refs
open product expansion gaps block downstream consumption until Human Gate approval
